name: Oyster Rockefeller Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen Spinach, thawed and drained
1/2 cup Toasted Bread or Cracker Crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Grease a large casserole dish.
3. Drain the oysters and arrange them in a single layer at the bottom of the casserole dish.
4. Melt the butter over medium heat, then sauté celery and onions until they begin to soften.
5. Add parsley, spinach, anise seed, Worcestershire sauce, bread crumbs, salt, pepper, and Cayenne pepper. Stir to combine.
6. Spread the mixture evenly over the oysters.
7. Bake for 30 minutes in a preheated oven at 450°F.
8. If necessary, remove any water that has cooked from the oysters.
9. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese and a very thin layer of toasted bread or cracker crumbs.
10. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes until slightly browned on top.
